subject: Golett, a squat rounded golem-like Pokemon with teal-green coloring, yellow accents, and a jagged mark on its torso, standing in a forest setting
description: A short, stout, roughly cylindrical creature stands among mossy rocks and dense green jungle foliage. Its body is teal-green with a slightly matte, clay-like texture, and a jagged or cracked yellow-accented mark crosses its mid-section. The limbs are rounded stubs. It faces forward with a stolid, expressionless presence. The surrounding forest is lush and wet-looking, with dark green leaves and stone, giving the scene a mystical or ancient feel. The creature's design evokes a constructed automaton or ancient golem animated by some internal force.
foreground: squat teal-green golem creature with yellow cracked marking on torso, rounded limbs
background: dense forest with mossy rocks, dark green leaves, jungle vegetation
